# CFStreamErrorHTTP.parseFailure

**Case**

A parsing error occurred while an incoming message was being deserialized and appended to a message object. The headers of the incoming message may be formatted improperly.

## Declaration

```swift
case parseFailure
```

## Constants

- **CFStreamErrorHTTP.redirectionLoop**: A redirection loop has been detected.
- **CFStreamErrorHTTP.badURL**: The URL is not properly formatted.

items.description: A redirection loop has been detected.
